apigatewayv2.stage.accesslogsettings.Des.Docs: The ARN of the CloudWatch Logs log group to receive access logs. This parameter is required to enable access logging.

apigatewayv2.stage.accesslogsettings.For.Docs: A single line format of the access logs of data, as specified by selected $context variables. The format must include at least $context.requestId. This parameter is required to enable access logging.
